creator: matthias.andree@gmx.de
text:
Additionally, please add the attached patch file (courtesy of Douglas  
Thrift) to files/ before committing, it implements Ethernet address  
retrieval on FreeBSD. This is needed for proper type 1 UUID generation and  
will be submitted upstream soon.

Thank you.

BTW, Martin: ping ;-)

-- 
Matthias Andree
